message:
feat(parser): enhance mindmap shape parsing and rewrite timeline as period-event model

Mindmap parser improvements:
- Add dedicated parse_mindmap_node_token() with support for all mindmap-specific
  node shapes: square [], rounded (), circle (()), bang ))(( , cloud )(, hexagon {{}}
- Handle ::icon() directives (recognized, not yet stored in IR)
- Handle :::class directives that apply CSS classes to the preceding node
- Add IrBuilder::get_node_by_id() accessor to support class directive lookups

Timeline parser rewrite:
- Replace flat linear event model with a proper period-event hierarchy
- Time periods are Rect-shaped nodes linked sequentially (2002->2004->2005)
- Events are Rounded-shaped child nodes linked from their parent period
- Support multiple colon-separated events per period (2004 : Facebook : Google)
- Support continuation events on indented lines (: Google on next line)
- Support section directives that group periods into clusters
- Support title directives (skipped as metadata)
- Extract parse_timeline_events() helper for colon-separated event parsing

Tests:
- Add 10 new tests covering mindmap shapes (square, rounded, circle, bang,
  cloud, hexagon), icon/class directives, and complex hierarchies
- Add 7 new tests covering timeline structure: basic periods, multiple events,
  continuation events, sections, and node shape assertions
- Update existing timeline_parses_events_as_linear_edges test to reflect
  the new period-event model (4 nodes / 3 edges instead of 2/1)

Issue tracker synced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
